creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 161984
patch-mail_phplist

There's bug fixes release of mail/phplist just after release of 3.2.0. I've made a patch to update port.

I've tested portbuild with poudriere. Log is available at:
https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2015-10-12_22h31m39s/logs/phplist-3.2.1.log

I hope that port will be updated soon :-)
